text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit sudden, but Nishino Flower will be
running in the Takarazuka Kinen. It'll be a
challenge for her to run a medium-distance race,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Can you slap my back, please?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Taiki told me a firm slap on the back helps get
her fired up and ready for anything!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to do my best today! I want to be able to
run 2,200 meters!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So go ahead and slap like you mean it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower looks at me with shining,
expectant eyes. Despite my reservations, I can't
just leave her hanging...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smack!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're so kind, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll lose now! Even if my seniors are
all so incredible, I'll... I'll...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll... beat them! I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's understandable why Nishino Flower is so
nervous. Today's lineup is nothing to sneeze at.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I haven't had the chance to run with you all since
spring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Remember how amazing Rice was?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: None of us could catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Since then, I have taken a closer look within and
retrained myself from the ground up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to make a bold declaration. Right now,
the opponent I must contend with is my past self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The trophy may have eluded me before, but it will
be mine today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha! Cool as always, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But it's the same for me. I gotta overcome my
past self too, which means taking this trophy!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I will not be handing the glory of the
title to either of you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Today, I will be the victor.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(They're all so amazing. It's going to be tough
standing shoulder to shoulder with them.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Smack!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello! I look forward to running with you today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You have a good look in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to running with you as well,
Flower. I hope you'll enjoy yourself to your heart's
content.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!
